parameters:
P-please stop♡ Young master♡ I've told you so many times not to do this while I'm
cooking♡ Mmmhh♡ No, not that♡ Oohh♡ Hoh, ~~~♡♡

...Ugh, that country bumpkin bitch...! If it weren't for her, I'd be the one
receiving the young master's love by now♡ Ugh, I'm so irritated I can't even focus on
cooking...!

\SE[5]Shut the fuck up♡ Who the hell do you think you are, a maid, ordering me around?♡
You're just getting your pussy dug out, so try to endure it♡ C'mon, c'mon♡ If you
can't even do your job properly, you're fired♡
条件ごとにボイスチャンネルを変える
条件ごとにボイスチャンネルを変える

Haaah... Oh, a guest? ...You really shouldn't go snooping around this mansion too
much. If you get in the young master's way, he'll kill you without a second thought.
